microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning and restructured scheduling workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing annual drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Drove strategic alignment across three cross-functional teams to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual intervention at integration checkpoints.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across a multi-team robotics software environment.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the company website and Google Business profile to surface higher-intent leads.
